calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Ann Hipshman, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberege, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff Hayes Valley Inn, LLC. by Property Manager: Dawn Wiggins.
Bryce Bloom, Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
immediate possession of the premises located at: 417 Gough St. #212-A AKA 422 Hayes ST. #212-A, San Francisco, CA.
Writ to Issue Inmediately but stayed to September 15, 2003 at 5PM
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
If the defendant vacates the premises on or before September 15, 2003, plaintiff waives all back rent, damages and to dismiss the action with prejudice.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
Defendant to Maintain Confidentialily of Settlement.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement or confidentiality, Plaintiff to enter Amended Judgment for back rent.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture. Attorney to file Written Judgment.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
